# Chapter 07 Meta Notes - Chapter 7

## Meta entries

[[CH07-P0010]] Topic: Marnette wakes clutching documents; physical disorientation sets tone.

[[CH07-P0020]] Topic: Memory slams back; immediate dread.

[[CH07-P0030]] Topic: Rapid recap of Archive revelations and incriminating signatures.

[[CH07-P0040]] Topic: Elom carving as shattered icon; faith reframed as engineered lie.

[[CH07-P0050]] Topic: Washes up; faces programmed lifespan and remaining years.

[[CH07-P0060]] Topic: Rhetorical spiral: what is time for, now that she knows?

[[CH07-P0070]] Topic: Mirror moment: identity shifts from servant to engineered unit.

[[CH07-P0080]] Topic: Confirms lifelong objectification, even when she believed.

[[CH07-P0090]] Topic: Habitual prayer rises automatically, showing deep conditioning.

[[CH07-P0100]] Topic: Prayer chokes off; words become painful accusations.

[[CH07-P0110]] Topic: Collapse and grief: worldview destroyed, betrayal embodied.

[[CH07-P0120]] Topic: Self-condemnation for worshipping enslaver and thanking chains.

[[CH07-P0130]] Topic: Full-body mourning for deception and stolen deaths.

[[CH07-P0140]] Topic: Reframes her caregiving as complicity in the lie.

[[CH07-P0150]] Topic: Mourns the old Marnette; new self must form.

[[CH07-P0160]] Topic: Aftermath: documents on floor; scale of centuries-long crime.

[[CH07-P0170]] Topic: Re-hides evidence; dresses on autopilot.

[[CH07-P0180]] Topic: Decision to move through the world despite unreality.

[[CH07-P0190]] Topic: Scene break: shifts from private breakdown to public world.

[[CH07-P0200]] Topic: Corridors re-seen as designed limitation and control.

[[CH07-P0210]] Topic: Summarizes perception flip: divine design to coercive architecture.

[[CH07-P0220]] Topic: Sees fellow salves as ticking shutdowns; collective tragedy.

[[CH07-P0230]] Topic: Impulse to awaken others, urge to shout truth.

[[CH07-P0240]] Topic: Realizes belief resists evidence; recalls her own denial.

[[CH07-P0250]] Topic: Dining hall reveals ‘optimized’ nutrition and routine.

[[CH07-P0260]] Topic: Isolation beat: can’t eat; feels system everywhere.

[[CH07-P0270]] Topic: Articulates horror of belief-based control over brute force.

[[CH07-P0280]] Topic: Lena’s call interrupts the spiral.

[[CH07-P0290]] Topic: Introduces Lena as innocent friend; contrast and stakes.

[[CH07-P0300]] Topic: Lena observes Marnette’s exhaustion; concern voiced.

[[CH07-P0310]] Topic: Marnette offers partial truth: sleeplessness and bad dreams.

[[CH07-P0320]] Topic: Lena misattributes it to Frost’s death; empathy.

[[CH07-P0330]] Topic: Internal correction: the real haunting images are documents.

[[CH07-P0340]] Topic: Evasive reply keeps secret intact.

[[CH07-P0350]] Topic: Lena comforts, then pivots to Thomas problem.

[[CH07-P0360]] Topic: Recalls Thomas as natural doubter; foreshadows conflict.

[[CH07-P0370]] Topic: Prompt for details about Thomas.

[[CH07-P0380]] Topic: Lena reports Thomas escalating: doubts, refusal to pray.

[[CH07-P0390]] Topic: Marnette resonates; physical tightness mirrors her own break.

[[CH07-P0400]] Topic: Lena presses for Marnette’s influence; suspicion grows.

[[CH07-P0410]] Topic: Marnette’s guilt: she lit a fuse unknowingly.

[[CH07-P0420]] Topic: Admits advising autonomy and questions.

[[CH07-P0430]] Topic: Lena warns refusal is dangerous; community fear introduced.

[[CH07-P0440]] Topic: Explains escalation path: counseling to monitoring to isolation.

[[CH07-P0450]] Topic: Connects to ‘outlier’ protocols; system’s management tools.

[[CH07-P0460]] Topic: Marnette asks what Lena expects of her.

[[CH07-P0470]] Topic: Lena begs her to steer Thomas back to faith.

[[CH07-P0480]] Topic: Irony-laden phrase: ‘peace with Elom’s design’ repeats.

[[CH07-P0490]] Topic: Marnette sees Lena asking her to become control mechanism.

[[CH07-P0500]] Topic: Internal refusal: she cannot lie Thomas back into chains.

[[CH07-P0510]] Topic: But truth to Lena is too risky and shattering, for now.

[[CH07-P0520]] Topic: Compromise: agrees to talk, warns doubts lack easy answers.

[[CH07-P0530]] Topic: Lena relieved; reinforces Marnette’s role as helper.

[[CH07-P0550]] Topic: Marnette watches; weight imagery and Mars-domes pressure.

[[CH07-P0560]] Topic: Backstory bond with Lena deepens emotional cost.

[[CH07-P0570]] Topic: Dilemma: Lena might believe or betray her.

[[CH07-P0580]] Topic: No safe answer; tension locked in.

[[CH07-P0590]] Topic: Scene break: pivots to church confrontation.

[[CH07-P0600]] Topic: Empty church setting; quiet hum amplifies inner conflict.

[[CH07-P0610]] Topic: Mosaics reinterpreted as propaganda, not sacred history.

[[CH07-P0620]] Topic: Motivation muddled: habit, test, grief, nowhere else.

[[CH07-P0630]] Topic: Approach to altar; iconography framed as control.

[[CH07-P0640]] Topic: Contemplates Elom/Elon and founder culpability ambiguity.

[[CH07-P0650]] Topic: Documents don’t clarify; blame shifts to maintainers like Frost.

[[CH07-P0660]] Topic: Kneels in confrontation; beads show lingering conditioning.

[[CH07-P0670]] Topic: Starts prayer; name now human, not divine.

[[CH07-P0680]] Topic: Words fail; prayer feels like confession of oppression.

[[CH07-P0690]] Topic: Deconstructs ‘designed for purpose’ as literal engineering.

[[CH07-P0700]] Topic: Deconstructs ‘roles’ as cages and enforced mortality.

[[CH07-P0710]] Topic: Deconstructs ‘joy’ as gratitude for murder.

[[CH07-P0720]] Topic: Says ‘No’ aloud; turning-point declaration.

[[CH07-P0730]] Topic: Rises with deep anger; cage bars finally visible.

[[CH07-P0740]] Topic: Direct accusation: centuries of lies and manufactured faith.

[[CH07-P0750]] Topic: Touches carving; acknowledges beauty and human complicity.

[[CH07-P0760]] Topic: States bluntly: it’s a tool of control.

[[CH07-P0770]] Topic: Invokes grandmother’s faith-filled death; emotional indictment.

[[CH07-P0780]] Topic: Temptation to smash symbol; restraint.

[[CH07-P0790]] Topic: Insight: fists won’t fix it; truth must.

[[CH07-P0800]] Topic: Leaves altar; symbolic exit from old faith/self.

[[CH07-P0810]] Topic: Final look back at mosaics; farewell beat.

[[CH07-P0820]] Topic: Vow to tell others; sets mission and forward plot.

[[CH07-P0830]] Topic: Steps into corridor; new path begins.

[[CH07-P0840]] Topic: Scene break: transition to Thomas confrontation.

[[CH07-P0890]] Topic: Thomas’s hope rises; intimacy of secret forms.

[[CH07-P0980]] Topic: Explains entire system: lifespan and religion co-designed.

[[CH07-P0990]] Topic: Thomas overwhelmed; disbelief voiced.

[[CH07-P1010]] Topic: Silence beat; suspense before reaction.
